     { id: \"second\", sequence: 9 },\n          { id: \"first\", sequence: 8 },\n        ],\n      ).map((event) => event.id),\n    ).toEqual([\"first\", \"second\"]);\n  });\n});\n\r\n\n---E2E ACCEPTANCE---\r\nimport AxeBuilder from \"@axe-core/playwright\";\nimport { expect, test, type Page } from \"@playwright/test\";\nimport fs from \"node:fs/promises\";\nimport path from \"node:path\";\n\nconst campaign = \"development-forever-treasure\";\nconst playerPath = `/tale/${campaign}`;\nconst artifacts = process.env.VALIDATION_ARTIFACTS ?? \"artifacts/validation\";\n\nasync function screenshot(page: Page, name: string) {\n  await fs.mkdir(artifacts, { recursive: true });\n  await page.screenshot({ path: path.join(artifacts, `${name}.png`), fullPage: true, caret: \"initial\" });\n}\n\nasync function gmAction(page: Page, label: string) {\n  await page.getByRole(\"button\", { name: label, exact: true }).click();\n  await expect(page.getByRole(\"dialog\")).toBeVisible();\n  await page.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Confirm action\" }).click();\n  await expect(page.getByRole(\"dialog\")).toBeHidden();\n}\n\nasync function status(page: Page) {\n  const response = await page.request.get(\"/api/gm/status\");\n  expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  return response.json() as Promise<{\n    campaign: { sequence: number; status: string };\n    chapter: { state: string };\n    events: Array<{ type: string; sequence: number }>;\n  }>;\n}\n\nasync function assertNoSeriousAxeViolations(page: Page) {\n  const results = await new AxeBuilder({ page }).analyze();\n  expect(results.violations.filter((violation) => [\"serious\", \"critical\"].includes(violation.impact ?? \"\"))).toEqual(\n    [],\n  );\n}\n\ntest.skip(\n  ({ browserName }) => browserName !== \"chromium\",\n  \"The full mutation workflow runs once; access gates run in every browser.\",\n);\n\ntest(\"complete live voyage workflow is private, ordered, resilient, and theatrical\", async ({ browser }) => {\n  test.setTimeout(180_000);\n\n  const playerContext = await browser.newContext();\n  const gmContext = await browser.newContext();\n  const player = await playerContext.newPage();\n  const gm = await gmContext.newPage();\n\n  const gateResponse = await player.goto(playerPath);\n  const gateMarkup = await gateResponse!.text();\n  expect(gateMarkup).not.toContain(\"The First Seal\");\n  expect(gateMarkup).not.toContain(\"Where weary crews return from foam\");\n  await screenshot(player, \"01-player-access-gate\");\n  await assertNoSeriousAxeViolations(player);\n\n  await player.getByLabel(\"Invitation phrase\").fill(\"incorrect-invitation\");\n  await player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Open the journal\" }).click();\n  await expect(player.locator(\".form-error\")).toContainText(\"could not be recognized\");\n  await player.getByLabel(\"Invitation phrase\").fill(process.env.PLAYER_ACCESS_CODE!);\n  await player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Open the journal\" }).click();\n  await expect(player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Open the journal\" })).toBeVisible();\n  await player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Open the journal\" }).click();\n  await expect(player.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"Awaiting the captainâ€™s signal\" })).toBeVisible();\n  await expect(player.getByText(\"Where weary crews return from foam\")).toHaveCount(0);\n  await expect(player.getByText(\"Tide connected\")).toBeVisible();\n  await screenshot(player, \"02-sealed-journal\");\n\n  await gm.goto(\"/quartermaster\");\n  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 5; attempt += 1) {\n    const response = await gm.request.post(\"/api/gm/login\", {\n      data: { username: \"rate-limit-probe\", password: \"wrong-password\" },\n    });\n    expect(response.status()).toBe(401);\n  }\n  const limited = await gm.request.post(\"/api/gm/login\", {\n    data: { username: \"rate-limit-probe\", password: \"wrong-password\" },\n  });\n  expect(limited.status()).toBe(429);\n  await gm.getByLabel(\"Captainâ€™s name\").fill(process.env.GM_USERNAME!);\n  await gm.getByLabel(\"Passphrase\").fill(\"definitely-wrong\");\n  await gm.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Enter the chart room\" }).click();\n  await expect(gm.locator(\".form-error\")).toContainText(\"does not recognize\");\n  await gm.getByLabel(\"Passphrase\").fill(process.env.GM_PASSWORD!);\n  await gm.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Enter the chart room\" }).click();\n  await expect(gm.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"Quartermasterâ€™s Log\" })).toBeVisible();\n  await expect(gm.getByText(\"Sequence 0\")).toBeVisible();\n  const gmCookie = (await gmContext.cookies()).find((cookie) => cookie.name === \"forever_gm\");\n  expect(gmCookie).toMatchObject({ httpOnly: true, sameSite: \"Strict\" });\n  expect((await playerContext.cookies()).some((cookie) => cookie.name === \"forever_gm\")).toBeFalsy();\n  await assertNoSeriousAxeViolations(gm);\n  await screenshot(gm, \"03-quartermaster-dashboard\");\n\n  await gmAction(gm, \"Prepare Chapter\");\n  await expect(gm.getByText(\"READY\", { exact: true }).first()).toBeVisible();\n  await expect(player.getByText(\"Where weary crews return from foam\")).toHaveCount(0);\n\n  const releasedAt = Date.now();\n  await gmAction(gm, \"Release Chapter\");\n  await expect(player.locator(\".voyage-shell.stage-seal\")).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5_000 });\n  await screenshot(player, \"04-ceremony-seal-break\");\n  await expect(player.locator(\".voyage-shell.stage-parchment\")).toBeVisible();\n  await screenshot(player, \"05-ceremony-parchment\");\n  await expect(player.locator(\".voyage-shell.stage-ink-story\")).toBeVisible();\n  await screenshot(player, \"06-ceremony-ink-reveal\");\n  await expect(player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Replay ceremony\" })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 12_000 });\n  expect(Date.now() - releasedAt).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(5_000);\n  expect(Date.now() - releasedAt).toBeLessThan(10_000);\n  await expect(player.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"The First Seal\" })).toBeVisible();\n  await expect(player.getByText(\"Where weary crews return from foam\")).toBeVisible();\n  await screenshot(player, \"07-active-chapter\");\n  await assertNoSeriousAxeViolations(player);\n\n  const beforeReplay = (await status(gm)).campaign.sequence;\n  await player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Replay ceremony\" }).click();\n  await expect(player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Reveal all now\" })).toBeVisible();\n  await player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Reveal all now\" }).click();\n  await expect(player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Replay ceremony\" })).toBeVisible();\n  expect((await status(gm)).campaign.sequence).toBe(beforeReplay);\n\n  await player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Sound on\" }).click();\n  await expect(player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Sound off\" })).toHaveAttribute(\"aria-pressed\", \"true\");\n  await player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Gentle motion\" }).click();\n  const gentleStarted = Date.now();\n  await player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Replay ceremony\" }).click();\n  await expect(player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Replay ceremony\" })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 4_000 });\n  expect(Date.now() - gentleStarted).toBeLessThan(3_000);\n\n  await player.reload();\n  await expect(player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Open the journal\" })).toBeVisible();\n  await player.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Open the journal\" }).click();\n  await expect(player.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"The First Seal\" })).toBeVisible();\n  await expect(player.getByText(\"Releasing the first seal\")).toHaveCount(0);\n\n  await gmAction(gm, \"Award Test Artifact\");\n  await expect(player.getByText(\"The Broken Compass Needle\")).toBeVisible();\n  await gm.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Award Test Artifact\", exact: true }).click();\n  await gm.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Confirm action\" }).click();\n  await expect(gm.locator(\".form-error\")).toContainText(\"already been awarded\");\n  await gm.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Cancel\" }).click();\n  await gm.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Reveal Test Map Location\", exact: true }).click();\n  await gm.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Confirm action\" }).click();\n  await expect(gm.locator(\".form-error\")).toContainText(\"already been revealed\");\n  await gm.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Cancel\" }).click();\n\n  await gmAction(gm, \"Mark Chapter Solved\");\n  await gm.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Mark Chapter Solved\", exact: true }).click();\n  await gm.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Confirm action\" }).click();\n  await expect(gm.locator(\".form-error\")).toContainText(\"Only an active chapter\");\n  await gm.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Cancel\" }).click();\n  await gmAction(gm, \"Undo Last Progression Action\");\n  await expect(gm.getByText(\"ACTIVE\", { exact: true }).first()).toBeVisible();\n\n  await playerContext.setOffline(true);\n  await player.evaluate(() => window.dispatchEvent(new Event(\"offline\")));\n  await expect(player.getByText(\"Signal adrift\")).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10_000 });\n  await gmAction(gm, \"Pause Campaign\");\n  await gmAction(gm, \"Resume Campaign\");\n  await playerContext.setOffline(false);\n  await player.evaluate(() => window.dispatchEvent(new Event(\"online\")));\n  await expect(player.getByText(\"Tide connected\")).toBeVisible({ timeout: 20_000 });\n  await expect(player.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"The First Seal\" })).toBeVisible();\n  expect((await status(gm)).campaign.status).toBe(\"ACTIVE\");\n\n  const heartbeat = await player.evaluate(async () => {\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    const timeout = window.setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 20_000);\n    try {\n      const response = await fetch(`/api/player/${location.pathname.split(\"/\").at(-1)}/events?after=999999`, {\n        signal: controller.signal,\n      });\n      const reader = response.body!.getReader();\n      const decoder = new TextDecoder();\n      let output = \"\";\n      while (!output.includes(\"event: heartbeat\")) output += decoder.decode((await reader.read()).value);\n      return output.includes(\"event: heartbeat\");\n    } finally {\n      clearTimeout(timeout);\n      controller.abort();\n    }\n  });\n  expect(heartbeat).toBeTruthy();\n\n  for (const [width, height, name] of [\n    [2560, 1440, \"desktop-2560\"],\n    [1920, 1080, \"desktop-1920\"],\n    [1440, 900, \"desktop-1440\"],\n    [390, 844, \"mobile-390\"],\n    [430, 932, \"mobile-430\"],\n    [844, 390, \"landscape-844\"],\n  ] as const) {\n    await player.setViewportSize({ width, height });\n    await screenshot(player, `08-${name}`);\n  }\n\n  await playerContext.close();\n  await gmContext.close();\n});\n\r\n\n---SQLITE SCHEMA HEAD---\r\ngenerator client {\r\n  provider = \"prisma-client-js\"\r\n}\r\n\r\ndatasource db {\r\n  provider = \"sqlite\"\r\n  url      = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel Campaign {\r\n  id              String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  slug            String   @unique\r\n  title           String\r\n  status          String   @default(\"PAUSED\")\r\n  accessCodeHash  String\r\n  currentSequence Int      @default(0)\r\n  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt\r\n  chapters        Chapter[]\r\n  artifacts       Artifact[]\r\n  mapLocations    MapLocation[]\r\n  sideQuests      SideQuest[]\r\n  events          ProgressEvent[]\r\n  snapshots       CampaignSnapshot[]\r\n  awards          ArtifactAward[]\r\n  journalEntries  JournalEntry[]\r\n  auditLogs       AdminAuditLog[]\r\n  saveStates      SaveStateSnapshot[]\r\n  playerAccesses  PlayerAccess[]\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel PlayerAccess {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  tokenHash   String   @unique\r\n  label       String?\r\n  expiresAt   DateTime?\r\n  lastSeenAt  DateTime?\r\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  audio       AudioPreference?\r\n  @@index([campaignId])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel GameMasterUser {\r\n  id           String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  username     String   @unique\r\n  passwordHash String\r\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\r\n  sessions     GameMasterSession[]\r\n  auditLogs    AdminAuditLog[]\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel GameMasterSession {\r\n  id        String   @id\r\n  userId    String\r\n  csrfToken String\r\n  expiresAt DateTime\r\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\r\n  user      GameMasterUser @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@index([userId, expiresAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel Chapter {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  ordinal     Int\r\n  state       String   @default(\"LOCKED\")\r\n  contentId   String\r\n  revealedAt  DateTime?\r\n  solvedAt    DateTime?\r\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  content     ChapterContent @relation(fields: [contentId], references: [id])\r\n  clues       Clue[]\r\n  hints       Hint[]\r\n  @@unique([campaignId, ordinal])\r\n  @@index([campaignId, state])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel ChapterContent {\r\n  id             String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  version        Int      @default(1)\r\n  title          String\r\n  narrative      String\r\n  objective      String\r\n  developmentOnly Boolean @default(true)\r\n  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())\r\n  chapters       Chapter[]\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel Clue {\r\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  chapterId String\r\n  ordinal   Int\r\n  body      String\r\n  chapter   Chapter @relation(fields: [chapterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@unique([chapterId, ordinal])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel Hint {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  chapterId   String\r\n  ordinal     Int\r\n  body        String\r\n  releasedAt  DateTime?\r\n  chapter     Chapter @relation(fields: [chapterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@unique([chapterId, ordinal])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel Artifact {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  key         String\r\n  name        String\r\n  description String\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  awards      ArtifactAward[]\r\n  @@unique([campaignId, key])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel ArtifactAward {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  artifactId  String\r\n  eventId     String?  @unique\r\n  awardedAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  artifact    Artifact @relation(fields: [artifactId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@unique([campaignId, artifactId])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel SideQuest {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  key         String\r\n  title       String\r\n  state       String   @default(\"UNDISCOVERED\")\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  objectives  SideQuestObjective[]\r\n  @@unique([campaignId, key])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel SideQuestObjective {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  sideQuestId String\r\n  ordinal     Int\r\n  body        String\r\n  complete    Boolean  @default(false)\r\n  sideQuest   SideQuest @relation(fields: [sideQuestId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@unique([sideQuestId, ordinal])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel JournalEntry {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  title       String\r\n  body        String\r\n  releasedAt  DateTime?\r\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@index([campaignId, releasedAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel MapLocation {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  key         String\r\n  name        String\r\n  regionLabel String\r\n  x           Float\r\n  y           Float\r\n  revealedAt  DateTime?\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@unique([campaignId, key])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel ProgressEvent {\r\n  id             String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId     String\r\n  type           String\r\n  payload        String\r\n  actor          String\r\n  sequence       Int\r\n  version        Int      @default(1)\r\n  releaseAt      DateTime @default(now())\r\n  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())\r\n  reversesEventId String?\r\n  supersededById String?\r\n  campaign       Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@unique([campaignId, sequence])\r\n  @@index([campaignId, releaseAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel CampaignSnapshot {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  sequence    Int\r\n  version     Int      @default(1)\r\n  state       String\r\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@unique([campaignId, sequence])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel AdminAuditLog {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  userId      String?\r\n  action      String\r\n  metadata    String\r\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  user        GameMasterUser? @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)\r\n  @@index([campaignId, createdAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel AudioPreference {\r\n  id             String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  playerAccessId String   @unique\r\n  muted          Boolean  @default(false)\r\n  masterVolume   Float    @default(0.45)\r\n  ambientVolume  Float    @default(0.25)\r\n  effectsVolume  Float    @default(0.55)\r\n  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt\r\n  playerAccess   PlayerAccess @relation(fields: [playerAccessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel ContentVersion {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  key         String\r\n  version     Int\r\n  checksum    String\r\n  publishedAt DateTime?\r\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n  @@unique([key, version])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel SaveStateSnapshot {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  sequence    Int\r\n  state       String\r\n  reason      String\r\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@index([campaignId, sequence])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel ViewedCeremony {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  deviceId    String\r\n  eventId     String\r\n  viewedAt    DateTime @default(now())\r\n  @@unique([campaignId, deviceId, eventId])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel LoginAttempt {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  fingerprint String\r\n  succeeded   Boolean\r\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n  @@index([fingerprint, createdAt])\r\n}\r\n\n---MYSQL SCHEMA---\r\ngenerator client {\r\n  provider = \"prisma-client-js\"\r\n}\r\n\r\ndatasource db {\r\n  provider = \"mysql\"\r\n  url      = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel Campaign {\r\n  id              String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  slug            String   @unique\r\n  title           String\r\n  status          String   @default(\"PAUSED\")\r\n  accessCodeHash  String\r\n  currentSequence Int      @default(0)\r\n  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt\r\n  chapters        Chapter[]\r\n  artifacts       Artifact[]\r\n  mapLocations    MapLocation[]\r\n  sideQuests      SideQuest[]\r\n  events          ProgressEvent[]\r\n  snapshots       CampaignSnapshot[]\r\n  awards          ArtifactAward[]\r\n  journalEntries  JournalEntry[]\r\n  auditLogs       AdminAuditLog[]\r\n  saveStates      SaveStateSnapshot[]\r\n  playerAccesses  PlayerAccess[]\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel PlayerAccess {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  tokenHash   String   @unique\r\n  label       String?\r\n  expiresAt   DateTime?\r\n  lastSeenAt  DateTime?\r\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  audio       AudioPreference?\r\n  @@index([campaignId])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel GameMasterUser {\r\n  id           String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  username     String   @unique\r\n  passwordHash String\r\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\r\n  sessions     GameMasterSession[]\r\n  auditLogs    AdminAuditLog[]\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel GameMasterSession {\r\n  id        String   @id\r\n  userId    String\r\n  csrfToken String\r\n  expiresAt DateTime\r\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\r\n  user      GameMasterUser @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@index([userId, expiresAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel Chapter {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  ordinal     Int\r\n  state       String   @default(\"LOCKED\")\r\n  contentId   String\r\n  revealedAt  DateTime?\r\n  solvedAt    DateTime?\r\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  content     ChapterContent @relation(fields: [contentId], references: [id])\r\n  clues       Clue[]\r\n  hints       Hint[]\r\n  @@unique([campaignId, ordinal])\r\n  @@index([campaignId, state])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel ChapterContent {\r\n  id             String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  version        Int      @default(1)\r\n  title          String\r\n  narrative      String\r\n  objective      String\r\n  developmentOnly Boolean @default(true)\r\n  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())\r\n  chapters       Chapter[]\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel Clue {\r\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  chapterId String\r\n  ordinal   Int\r\n  body      String\r\n  chapter   Chapter @relation(fields: [chapterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@unique([chapterId, ordinal])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel Hint {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  chapterId   String\r\n  ordinal     Int\r\n  body        String\r\n  releasedAt  DateTime?\r\n  chapter     Chapter @relation(fields: [chapterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  @@unique([chapterId, ordinal])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel Artifact {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  key         String\r\n  name        String\r\n  description String\r\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  awards      ArtifactAward[]\r\n  @@unique([campaignId, key])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel ArtifactAward {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId  String\r\n  artifactId  String\r\n  eventId     String?  @unique\r\n  awardedAt   DateTime item.lastSeenAt.getTime() < 45000,\n    ),\n    events: campaign.events.map((event) => ({\n      id: event.id,\n      type: event.type,\n      sequence: event.sequence,\n      createdAt: event.createdAt,\n    })),\n    inventory: campaign.artifacts.filter((item) => item.awards.length).map((item) => item.name),\n    sideQuest: campaign.sideQuests[0]\n      ? { title: campaign.sideQuests[0].title, state: campaign.sideQuests[0].state }\n      : null,\n    preview: await buildPublicSnapshot(campaign.id),\n  });\n}\n\r\n\"use client\";\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { cinematicSequences, type CinematicSequenceName } from \"@/components/cinematic/sequences\";\nimport { useCinematicTransition, type MotionMode } from \"@/components/cinematic/useCinematicTransition\";\ntype Status = {\n  csrfToken: string;\n  campaign: { slug: string; title: string; status: string; sequence: number };\n  chapter: { ordinal: number; state: string; title: string };\n  playerConnected: boolean;\n  events: Array<{ id: string; type: string; sequence: number; createdAt: string }>;\n  inventory: string[];\n  sideQuest: { title: string; state: string } | null;\n  preview: { chapter: { objective?: string } };\n};\nconst actions = [\n  [\n    \"PREPARE_CHAPTER\",\n    \"Prepare Chapter\",\n    \"Move the sealed chapter into a ready state. The player still receives no clue text.\",\n  ],\n  [\"RELEASE_CHAPTER\", \"Release Chapter\", \"Publish the clue, begin the player ceremony, and make Chapter One active.\"],\n  [\"MARK_SOLVED\", \"Mark Chapter Solved\", \"Record that the current chapter has been solved.\"],\n  [\"AWARD_ARTIFACT\", \"Award Test Artifact\", \"Place the Broken Compass Needle in the playerâ€™s relic frame.\"],\n  [\"REVEAL_MAP\", \"Reveal Test Map Location\", \"Mark Port Merrick on the voyage chart.\"],\n  [\n    \"UNDO_LAST\",\n    \"Undo Last Progression Action\",\n    \"Restore the last saved progression state and publish a reconciliation event.\",\n  ],\n  [\"PAUSE\", \"Pause Campaign\", \"Pause the voyage without hiding already released material.\"],\n  [\"RESUME\", \"Resume Campaign\", \"Return the voyage to active status.\"],\n] as const;\nexport function Quartermaster({ authenticated }: { authenticated: boolean }) {\n  const [signedIn, setSignedIn] = useState(authenticated);\n  const [status, setStatus] = useState<Status | null>(null);\n  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<(typeof actions)[number] | null>(null);\n  const [message, setMessage] = useState(\"\");\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [motionMode, setMotionMode] = useState<MotionMode>(\"full\");\n  const transition = useCinematicTransition(motionMode);\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const media = matchMedia(\"(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)\");\n    const sync = () => setMotionMode(media.matches || localStorage.getItem(\"forever-motion\") === \"reduced\" ? \"reduced\" : localStorage.getItem(\"forever-motion\") === \"gentle\" ? \"gentle\" : \"full\");\n    sync();\n    media.addEventListener(\"change\", sync);\n    return () => media.removeEventListener(\"change\", sync);\n  }, []);\n  const refresh = useCallback(async () => {\n    const response = await fetch(\"/api/gm/status\", { cache: \"no-store\" });\n    if (response.ok) {\n      setStatus(await response.json());\n      setSignedIn(true);\n    }\n  }, []);\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!signedIn) return;\n    void fetch(\"/api/gm/status\", { cache: \"no-store\" }).then(async (response) => {\n      if (response.ok) setStatus(await response.json());\n    });\n  }, [signedIn]);\n  async function login(event: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) {\n    event.preventDefault();\n    setError(\"\");\n    const form = new FormData(event.currentTarget);\n    try {\n      await transition.play(\"signIn\", cinematicSequences.signIn, async () => {\n        const response = await fetch(\"/api/gm/login\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({ username: form.get(\"username\"), [REDACTED: SECRET ASSIGNMENT]"password\") }),\n        });\n        const data = await response.json();\n        if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data.error);\n        return data;\n      });\n      setSignedIn(true);\n      void refresh();\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"The lock refused the key.\");\n    }\n  }\n  async function execute() {\n    if (!selected || !status) return;\n    setBusy(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    const action = selected;\n    const sequenceByAction: Record<string, CinematicSequenceName> = {\n      PREPARE_CHAPTER: \"prepare\", RELEASE_CHAPTER: \"release\", MARK_SOLVED: \"solved\", AWARD_ARTIFACT: \"artifact\",\n      REVEAL_MAP: \"map\", UNDO_LAST: \"undo\", PAUSE: \"pause\", RESUME: \"resume\",\n    };\n    try {\n      const data = await transition.play(sequenceByAction[action[0]], cinematicSequences[sequenceByAction[action[0]]], async () => {\n        const response = await fetch(\"/api/gm/action\", {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": status.csrfToken },\n          body: JSON.stringify({ action: action[0], campaignSlug: status.campaign.slug, confirmation: true }),\n        });\n        const body = await response.json();\n        if (!response.ok) throw new Error(body.error);\n        setSelected(null);\n        return body;\n      });\n      if (data) {\n      setMessage(`Event ${data.event.id} recorded at sequence ${data.event.sequence}.`);\n      await refresh();\n      }\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"The order could not be recorded.\");\n    }\n    setBusy(false);\n  }\n  if (!signedIn)\n    return (\n      <main className={`quartermaster-login cinematic-${transition.stage}`}>\n        <div className=\"cabin-door\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><span>Private command surface</span></div>\n        <section className=\"login-ledger\">\n          <div className=\"brass-latch\" aria-hidden=\"true\">F</div>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Restricted chart room</p>\n          <h1>Quartermasterâ€™s Log</h1>\n          <p>Captain, identify yourself before touching the voyage ledger.</p>\n          <form onSubmit={login}>\n            <label>\n              Captainâ€™s name\n              <input name=\"username\" autoComplete=\"username\" required />\n            </label>\n            <label>\n              Passphrase\n              <input name=\"password\" type=\"password\" autoComplete=\"current-password\" required minLength={8} />\n            </label>\n            <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={transition.isPlaying}>{transition.isPlaying ? \"Turning the keyâ€¦\" : \"Enter the chart room\"}</button>\n            {error && (\n              <p className=\"form-error\" role=\"alert\">\n                {error}\n              </p>\n            )}\n          </form>\n        </section>\n        <CinematicOverlay name={transition.name} stage={transition.stage} active={transition.isPlaying} />\n      </main>\n    );\n  if (!status) return <main className=\"quartermaster-shell loading-quarters\">Opening the voyage ledgerâ€¦</main>;\n  return (\n    <main className={`quartermaster-shell cinematic-${transition.stage}`}>\n      <header>\n        <div>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Private command surface</p>\n          <h1>Quartermasterâ€™s Log</h1>\n        </div>\n        <div className=\"campaign-stamp\">\n          <span>{status.campaign.status}</span>\n          <b>Sequence {status.campaign.sequence}</b>\n        </div>\n      </header>\n      <section className=\"gm-grid\">\n        <div className=\"gm-status-card\">\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Active voyage</p>\n          <h2>{status.campaign.title}</h2>\n          <dl>\n            <div>\n              <dt>Chapter</dt>\n              <dd>\n                {status.chapter.ordinal} Â· {status.chapter.title}\n              </dd>\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <dt>Chapter state</dt>\n              <dd>{status.chapter.state}</dd>\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <dt>Player signal</dt>\n              <dd className={status.playerConnected ? \"signal-live\" : \"\"}>\n                {status.playerConnected ? \"Connected recently\" : \"No recent signal\"}\n              </dd>\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <dt>Side quest</dt>\n              <dd>{status.sideQuest?.state ?? \"None\"}</dd>\n            </div>\n          </dl>\n        </div>\n        <div className=\"gm-preview\">\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Playerâ€™s present view</p>\n          <div className=\"mini-page\">\n            <span>{status.chapter.state}</span>\n            <strong>{status.preview.chapter.objective ?? \"Awaiting the captainâ€™s signal.\"}</strong>\n          </div>\n          <a href={`/tale/${status.campaign.slug}`} target=\"_blank\">\n            Open player view â†—\n          </a>\n        </div>\n        <div className=\"gm-actions\">\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Progression controls</p>\n          <div className=\"action-list\">\n            {actions.map((action) => (\n              <button\n                key={action[0]}\n                aria-label={action[1]}\n                className={action[0] === \"UNDO_LAST\" ? \"danger-action\" : \"\"}\n                onClick={() => setSelected(action)}\n              >\n                <strong>{action[1]}</strong>\n                <span>{action[2]}</span>\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        <div className=\"gm-events\">\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Recent ledger entries</p>\n          <ol>\n            {status.events.map((event) => (\n              <li key={event.id}>\n                <span>{event.sequence}</span>\n                <b>{event.type.replaceAll(\"_\", \" \")}</b>\n                <time>{new Date(event.createdAt).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: \"2-digit\", minute: \"2-digit\" })}</time>\n              </li>\n            ))}\n          </ol>\n          <p>Relics aboard: {status.inventory.length ? status.inventory.join(\", \") : \"none\"}</p>\n        </div>\n      </section>\n      {message && (\n        <div className=\"gm-toast\" role=\"status\">\n          {message}\n        </div>\n      )}\n      {selected && (\n        <div className=\"confirm-backdrop\">\n          <section className=\"confirm-sheet\" role=\"dialog\" aria-modal=\"true\" aria-labelledby=\"confirm-title\">\n            <p className=\"eyebrow\">Confirm ledger action</p>\n            <h2 id=\"confirm-title\">{selected[1]}</h2>\n            <p>{selected[2]}</p>\n            <div className=\"impact-note\">\n              <b>What happens next</b>\n              <span>\n                This runs atomically, writes an audit entry, publishes one ordered event, and creates a state point for\n                undo.\n              </span>\n            </div>\n            {error && (\n              <p className=\"form-error\" role=\"alert\">\n                {error}\n              </p>\n            )}\n            <div>\n              <button onClick={() => setSelected(null)}>Cancel</button>\n              <button className=\"confirm-action\" disabled={busy} onClick={execute}>\n                {busy ? \"Recordingâ€¦\" : \"Confirm action\"}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </section>\n        </div>\n      )}\n      <CinematicOverlay name={transition.name} stage={transition.stage} active={transition.isPlaying} />\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction CinematicOverlay({ name, stage, active }: { name: string; stage: string; active: boolean }) {\n  if (!active) return null;\n  return (\n    <div className={`cinematic-command-overlay scene-${name} scene-stage-${stage}`} aria-live=\"polite\" aria-label={`${name} ceremony: ${stage}`}>\n      <div className=\"lantern-sweep\" aria-hidden=\"true\" />\n      <div className=\"ceremony-seal\" aria-hidden=\"true\">F</div>\n      <p>{stage.replaceAll(\"-\", \" \")}</p>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\r\n M src/app/globals.css\n M src/components/gm/Quartermaster.tsx\n M src/components/player/PlayerExperience.tsx\n?? onDelete: Cascade)\n+  @@unique([campaignId, key])\n+  @@index([campaignId, ordinal])\n+}\n@@\n model AudioPreference {\n@@\n   effectsVolume  Float    @default(0.55)\n+  motionMode     String   @default(\"SYSTEM\")\n+  textScale      Float    @default(1)\n+  ambientEffects Boolean  @default(true)\n+  textureIntensity Float  @default(1)\n+  fullscreenPreferred Boolean @default(false)\n@@\n }\n+\n+model ViewedContent {\n+  id             String   @id @default(cuid())\n+  playerAccessId String\n+  contentType    String\n+  contentKey     String\n+  viewedAt       DateTime @default(now())\n+  playerAccess   PlayerAccess @relation(fields: [playerAccessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n+  @@unique([playerAccessId, contentType, contentKey])\n+  @@index([playerAccessId, viewedAt])\n+}\n*** End Patch";

await db.viewedContent.findMany({ where: { playerAccessId }, select: { contentType: true, contentKey: true } })\n+    : [];\n+  const viewedKeys = new Set(viewed.map((item) => `${item.contentType}:${item.contentKey}`));\n+  const isUnseen = (type: string, key: string, released: boolean) => released && !viewedKeys.has(`${type}:${key}`);\n+\n+  const chapters: PublicChapter[] = campaign.chapters.map((item) => {\n+    const readable = readableChapterStates.has(item.state);\n+    const chapter: PublicChapter = {\n+      ordinal: item.ordinal,\n+      state: item.state as PublicChapter[\"state\"],\n+      ...(item.safeTeaser ? { teaser: item.safeTeaser } : {}),\n+      unseen: isUnseen(\"chapter\", String(item.ordinal), readable),\n+    };\n+    if (!readable) return chapter;\n+    const annotations = campaign.journalEntries\n+      .filter((entry) => entry.chapterOrdinal === item.ordinal)\n+      .map((entry) => ({ key: entry.id, title: entry.title, body: entry.body, createdAt: entry.createdAt.toISOString(), unseen: isUnseen(\"annotation\", entry.id, true) }));\n+    return {\n+      ...chapter,\n+      title: item.content.title,\n+      narrative: item.content.narrative,\n+      objective: item.content.objective,\n+      riddle: item.clues[0]?.body,\n+      hints: item.hints.filter((hint) => hint.releasedAt).map((hint) => ({ ordinal: hint.ordinal, body: hint.body, releasedAt: hint.releasedAt!.toISOString(), unseen: isUnseen(\"hint\", hint.id, true) })),\n+      annotations,\n+      related: {\n+        ...(item.relatedMapKey ? { mapKey: item.relatedMapKey } : {}),\n+        ...(item.relatedArtifactKey ? { artifactKey: item.relatedArtifactKey } : {}),\n+        ...(item.relatedSideQuestKey ? { sideQuestKey: item.relatedSideQuestKey } : {}),\n+      },\n+    };\n+  });\n+  const chapter = [...chapters].reverse().find((item) => [\"REVEALING\", \"ACTIVE\", \"SOLVED\"].includes(item.state)) ?? chapters.find((item) => item.state !== \"LOCKED\") ?? chapters[0];\n+\n+  const artifacts: PublicArtifact[] = campaign.artifacts.map((item) => {\n+    const state = item.awards.length ? (item.state === \"UNKNOWN\" || item.state === \"SILHOUETTE\" ? \"AWARDED\" : item.state) : item.state;\n+    const detailed = detailedArtifactStates.has(state);\n+    return {\n+      key: item.key,\n+      state,\n+      displayX: item.displayX,\n+      displayY: item.displayY,\n+      ...(item.assemblyGroup ? { assemblyGroup: item.assemblyGroup, assemblyPosition: item.assemblyPosition ?? undefined } : {}),\n+      ...(state === \"SILHOUETTE\" ? { safeName: item.safeName ?? undefined, silhouetteLabel: item.silhouetteLabel ?? \"Unidentified relic\" } : {}),\n+      ...(detailed ? { name: item.name, category: item.category, description: item.description, discoveryText: item.discoveryText ?? undefined, connectedArtifactKey: item.connectedArtifactKey ?? undefined, chapterOrdinal: item.chapterOrdinal ?? undefined, awardedAt: item.awards[0]?.awardedAt.toISOString() } : {}),\n+      unseen: isUnseen(\"artifact\", item.key, state !== \"UNKNOWN\"),\n+    };\n+  });\n+\n+  const mapLocations = campaign.mapLocations.filter((item) => item.state !== \"UNKNOWN\").map((item) => {\n+    const exact = coordinateStates.has(item.state) && Boolean(item.revealedAt);\n+    return {\n+      key: item.key,\n+      state: item.state,\n+      label: exact ? item.name : item.safeLabel ?? \"A place beyond the fog\",\n+      ...(exact ? { regionLabel: item.regionLabel, locationType: item.locationType, description: item.description ?? undefined, exactness: item.exactness, x: item.x, y: item.y, mobileX: item.mobileX ?? undefined, mobileY: item.mobileY ?? undefined, chapterOrdinal: item.chapterOrdinal ?? undefined, sideQuestKey: item.sideQuestKey ?? undefined } : {}),\n+      unseen: isUnseen(\"map\", item.key, Boolean(item.revealedAt)),\n+    };\n+  });\n+  const visibleLocationKeys = new Set(mapLocations.filter((item) => item.x !== undefined).map((item) => item.key));\n+  const mapRoutes = campaign.mapRoutes.filter((route) => route.state !== \"HIDDEN\" && route.revealedAt && visibleLocationKeys.has(route.fromKey) && visibleLocationKeys.has(route.toKey)).map((route) => ({ key: route.key, fromKey: route.fromKey, toKey: route.toKey, ordinal: route.ordinal, state: route.state, ...(route.annotation ? { annotation: route.annotation } : {}), unseen: isUnseen(\"route\", route.key, true) }));\n+\n+  const sideQuests: PublicSideQuest[] = campaign.sideQuests.filter((item) => item.state !== \"HIDDEN\").map((item) => {\n+    const detailed = detailedQuestStates.has(item.state);\n+    return {\n+      key: item.key,\n+      state: item.state,\n+      ...(item.safeTeaser ? { teaser: item.safeTeaser } : {}),\n+      ...(detailed ? { title: item.title, description: item.description ?? undefined, objectives: item.objectives.map(({ ordinal, body, complete }) => ({ ordinal, body, complete })), reward: item.rewardType ? { type: item.rewardType, label: item.rewardLabel ?? undefined } : undefined, completionSummary: item.state === \"COMPLETE\" ? item.completionSummary ?? undefined : undefined, chapterOrdinal: item.chapterOrdinal ?? undefined, mapLocationKey: item.mapLocationKey ?? undefined, artifactKey: item.artifactKey ?? undefined } : {}),\n+      unseen: isUnseen(\"quest\", item.key, item.state !== \"RUMORED\"),\n+    };\n+  });\n+\n+  const log = campaign.events.map((event) => eventToLogEntry(event, isUnseen(\"log\", event.id, true))).filter((entry): entry is NonNullable<typeof entry> => Boolean(entry));\n+  const finaleReleased = campaign.finaleState !== \"HIDDEN\";\n+  const finale = { state: campaign.finaleState, ...(finaleReleased && campaign.finaleTeaser ? { teaser: campaign.finaleTeaser } : {}), requirements: finaleReleased ? requirementList(campaign.finaleRequirements) : [], unseen: isUnseen(\"finale\", campaign.finaleState, finaleReleased) };\n+  const unseen = {\n+    journal: chapters.filter((item) => item.unseen).length + chapters.flatMap((item) => item.hints ?? []).filter((item) => item.unseen).length,\n+    chart: mapLocations.filter((item) => item.unseen).length + mapRoutes.filter((item) => item.unseen).length,\n+    treasures: artifacts.filter((item) => item.unseen).length,\n+    quests: sideQuests.filter((item) => item.unseen).length,\n+    log: log.filter((item) => item.unseen).length,\n+    finale: finale.unseen ? 1 : 0,\n+  };\n+  return { campaign: { slug: campaign.slug, title: campaign.title, status: campaign.status }, sequence: campaign.currentSequence, chapter, chapters, artifacts, mapLocations, mapRoutes, sideQuests, sideQuest: sideQuests.find((item) => item.title) ? { title: sideQuests.find((item) => item.title)!.title!, state: sideQuests.find((item) => item.title)!.state } : null, log, finale, unseen };\n+}\n*** End Patch";

\"AWARDED\" : \"UNKNOWN\", description: \"A development-only optional reward.\", discoveryText: \"Granted for following an optional star-mark.\", displayX: 84, displayY: 28, assemblyPosition: \"north\", connectedArtifactKey: null, chapterOrdinal: null },\n+    { key: \"empty-assembly-position\", name: \"Reserved Development Position\", safeName: null, state: \"UNKNOWN\", description: \"This name must remain hidden.\", discoveryText: null, displayX: 58, displayY: 78, assemblyPosition: \"south\", connectedArtifactKey: null, chapterOrdinal: null },\n+  ];\n+  for (const artifact of artifacts) {\n+    const created = await db.artifact.create({ data: { campaignId: campaign.id, category: \"DEVELOPMENT_RELIC\", silhouetteLabel: \"A safe practice silhouette\", assemblyGroup: \"neutral-test-array\", ...artifact } });\n+    if ([\"AWARDED\", \"CONNECTED\", \"INSPECTED\"].includes(artifact.state)) await db.artifactAward.create({ data: { campaignId: campaign.id, artifactId: created.id } });\n+  }\n+\n+  const questStates = expanded ? [\"HIDDEN\", \"RUMORED\", \"ACTIVE\", \"COMPLETE\"] : [\"HIDDEN\", \"RUMORED\", \"HIDDEN\", \"HIDDEN\"];\n+  const quests = [\n+    [\"sleeping-rumor\", \"The Sleeping Rumor\", \"A rumor that remains fully hidden.\", \"HIDDEN\"],\n+    [\"bell-in-fog\", \"The Bell in the Fog\", \"A bell-shaped mark appears in the margin.\", \"RUMORED\"],\n+    [\"borrowed-star\", \"The Borrowed Star\", \"Follow the optional star marks without delaying the main voyage.\", questStates[2]],\n+    [\"paper-constellation\", \"The Paper Constellation\", \"A completed development mystery about folded practice charts.\", questStates[3]],\n+  ] as const;\n+  for (const [key, title, description, state] of quests) await db.sideQuest.create({ data: { campaignId: campaign.id, key, title, description, state, safeTeaser: state === \"RUMORED\" ? description : null, rewardType: \"MEMORY_STAR\", rewardLabel: state === \"COMPLETE\" ? \"Development Star\" : null, completionSummary: state === \"COMPLETE\" ? \"The practice constellation now rests in the ledger.\" : null, mapLocationKey: key === \"borrowed-star\" ? \"starling-inlet\" : null, artifactKey: key === \"borrowed-star\" ? \"practice-moon-shard\" : null, completedAt: state === \"COMPLETE\" ? new Date() : null, objectives: { create: [{ ordinal: 1, body: `Observe the first safe sign for ${title}.`, complete: state === \"COMPLETE\" }, { ordinal: 2, body: \"Record the optional development observation.\", complete: state === \"COMPLETE\" }] } } });\n+\n+  if (expanded) await db.journalEntry.create({ data: { campaignId: campaign.id, title: \"Cartographer’s margin\", body: \"The blue ink is development-only and may be replaced without changing this component.\", kind: \"ANNOTATION\", chapterOrdinal: 2, releasedAt: new Date() } });\n+  const eventTemplates = expanded ? [\n+    [\"CAMPAIGN_STARTED\", {}], [\"CHAPTER_RELEASED\", { ordinal: 1, title: chapters[0][0] }], [\"MAP_LOCATION_REVEALED\", { key: \"practice-harbor\", name: \"Practice Harbor\" }], [\"ARTIFACT_AWARDED\", { key: \"brass-lantern-key\", name: \"Brass Lantern Key\" }], [\"CHAPTER_SOLVED\", { ordinal: 1 }], [\"CHAPTER_RELEASED\", { ordinal: 2, title: chapters[1][0] }], [\"MAP_LOCATION_REVEALED\", { key: \"moonwake-cay\", name: \"Moonwake Cay\" }], [\"MAP_ROUTE_REVEALED\", { key: \"harbor-to-cay\", fromKey: \"practice-harbor\", toKey: \"moonwake-cay\" }], [\"HINT_RELEASED\", { ordinal: 2, hintOrdinal: 1 }], [\"SIDE_QUEST_DISCOVERED\", { key: \"borrowed-star\", title: \"The Borrowed Star\" }], [\"SIDE_QUEST_COMPLETED\", { key: \"paper-constellation\", title: \"The Paper Constellation\", rewardLabel: \"Development Star\" }], [\"FINALE_REQUIREMENT_UPDATED\", { key: \"chapter-seals\" }],\n+  ] as Array<[string, Record<string, unknown>]> : [];\n+  if (preset === \"long-log\" || preset === \"mobile-stress-test\") for (let i = 0; i < 80; i += 1) eventTemplates.push([i % 2 ? \"PLAYER_LOG_ENTRY_ADDED\" : \"JOURNAL_ANNOTATION_ADDED\", { key: `stress-${i}`, title: `Development stress entry ${i + 1}`, chapterOrdinal: 2 }]);\n+  for (let index = 0; index < eventTemplates.length; index += 1) await db.progressEvent.create({ data: { campaignId: campaign.id, type: eventTemplates[index][0], payload: JSON.stringify(eventTemplates[index][1]), actor: \"development-seed\", sequence: index + 1 } });\n+  await db.campaign.update({ where: { id: campaign.id }, data: { currentSequence: eventTemplates.length } });\n+\n+  const playerToken = randomBytes(24).toString(\"base64url\");\n+  await db.playerAccess.create({ data: { campaignId: campaign.id, tokenHash: hash(playerToken), label: \"Development player\" } });\n+  await db.contentVersion.create({ data: { key: `development-companion-${preset}`, version: 1, checksum: hash(JSON.stringify(chapters)) } });\n+  console.log(`Development preset '${preset}' ready for ${campaign.slug}; GM user: ${user.username}. Credentials come from local environment values.`);\n+}\n+\n+main().finally(() => db.$disconnect());\n*** Update File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\package.json\n@@\n     \"db:seed\": \"tsx prisma/seed.ts\",\n+    \"db:preset\": \"tsx prisma/seed.ts\",\n*** End Patch";

db = new PrismaClient();\nconst acceptance = process.argv.includes(\"--acceptance\");\n\nfunction assert(condition: unknown, message: string): asserts condition {\n  if (!condition) throw new Error(`Database verification failed: ${message}`);\n}\n\nasync function main() {\n  const campaign = await db.campaign.findUnique({\n    where: { slug: \"development-forever-treasure\" },\n    include: {\n      chapters: true,\n      artifacts: true,\n      mapLocations: true,\n      events: { orderBy: { sequence: \"asc\" } },\n      snapshots: true,\n      awards: true,\n      auditLogs: true,\n      saveStates: true,\n      playerAccesses: true,\n    },\n  });\n  assert(campaign, \"the development campaign is missing\");\n  assert(campaign.chapters.length === 1, \"exactly one development chapter is required\");\n  assert(campaign.artifacts.length === 1, \"exactly one development artifact is required\");\n  assert(campaign.mapLocations.length === 1, \"exactly one development map location is required\");\n  assert(campaign.playerAccesses.length === 1, \"exactly one development player access is required\");\n  assert(campaign.currentSequence === campaign.events.length, \"campaign sequence must equal its ordered event count\");\n  assert(\n    campaign.events.every((event, index) => event.sequence === index + 1),\n    \"event sequences must be contiguous\",\n  );\n  assert(\n    new Set(campaign.events.map((event) => event.sequence)).size === campaign.events.length,\n    \"event sequences must be unique\",\n  );\n  assert(campaign.snapshots.length === campaign.events.length, \"every progression event must have a campaign snapshot\");\n  assert(campaign.auditLogs.length === campaign.events.length, \"every progression event must have an audit record\");\n  assert(campaign.awards.length <= 1, \"an artifact may only be awarded once\");\n\n  if (!acceptance) {\n    assert(campaign.currentSequence === 0, \"a fresh validation database must start at sequence zero\");\n    assert(campaign.chapters[0].state === \"LOCKED\", \"a fresh chapter must be locked\");\n  } else {\n    const eventTypes = new Set(campaign.events.map((event) => event.type));\n    for (const expected of [\n      \"CHAPTER_PREPARED\",\n      \"CHAPTER_RELEASED\",\n      \"ARTIFACT_AWARDED\",\n      \"CAMPAIGN_PAUSED\",\n      \"CAMPAIGN_RESUMED\",\n      \"CHAPTER_SOLVED\",\n      \"STATE_REVERTED\",\n    ]) {\n      assert(eventTypes.has(expected), `acceptance run did not record ${expected}`);\n    }\n    assert(campaign.awards.length === 1, \"acceptance run must persist one artifact award\");\n    assert(campaign.mapLocations[0].revealedAt, \"acceptance run must persist the released map location\");\n    assert(campaign.saveStates.length > 0, \"acceptance run must retain undo save states\");\n  }\n\n  console.log(\n    `Database verified: ${campaign.events.length} events, ${campaign.auditLogs.length} audit entries, sequence ${campaign.currentSequence}.`,\n  );\n}\n\nmain().finally(() => db.$disconnect());\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

L290: \nL291: cite97†vitest.setup.ts L292: \nL293: View all files\nL294: ## Repository files navigation\nL295: \nL296:   *   * README\nL297:   * Security\nL298: \nL299: More items\nL300: \nL301: # The Forever Treasure Companion\nL302: \nL303: Production-oriented foundation and fully automated local demo for a private nautical-fantasy date-night Tall Tale. All committed story material is generic development seed content; no final surprise content belongs in this public repository.\nL304: ## Current phase\nL305: \nL306: Phase one provides a sealed player journal, responsive chart/relic workspace, private quartermaster dashboard, authenticated transactional progression, ordered SSE delivery, replay/skip/reduced-motion ceremony controls, state undo, development seed data for “The First Seal,” and reproducible one-command startup and validation.\nL307: ## Stack\nL308: \nL309:   * Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, strict TypeScript\nL310:   * Prisma 6.19 with SQLite for local/test and an equivalent MySQL production schema\nL311:   * Framer Motion with pinned compatible motion packages\nL312:   * bcrypt password/access-code hashing, server-side database sessions, CSRF tokens, and rate limiting\nL313:   * Vitest and Playwright\nL314: ## Reproducible setup\nL315: \nL316: Requirements: Windows PowerShell 5.1+, Node.js 24, npm 11, and Git. MySQL 8 is only required for production parity; the supported local/demo/test strategy is SQLite.\nL317: ### Fastest Windows demo\nL318: \nL319: After cloning, double-click `Start Forever Treasure Dev.cmd`, or run:\nL320: \nL321:     npm run dev:full\nL322: The launcher creates an ignored `.env` when absent, installs the exact lockfile, generates Prisma, applies migrations, seeds generic disposable data, starts the app, checks health, and prints the URLs and credentials. Network/UNC workspaces are mirrored to an ignored local runtime under `%LOCALAPPDATA%` because Node and SQLite are unreliable on network shares. Stop it with `npm run dev:stop`.\nL323:   * Player: `http://127.0.0.1:3000/tale/development-forever-treasure`\nL324:   * Player phrase: `development-moonwake`\nL325:   * GM: `http://127.0.0.1:3000/quartermaster`\nL326:   * GM development[REDACTED: LOGIN CREDENTIAL]\nL327: \nL328: These values are disposable local defaults, never production credentials. To opt into LAN access, run `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/start-dev.ps1 -Lan`; Windows Firewall and network policy still determine whether another device can connect.\nL329: ### Portable manual setup\nL330: \nL331:     git clone https://github.com/Kgray44/treasurehuntSoT.git\nL332:     cd treasurehuntSoT\nL333:     npm ci\nL334:     cp .env.example .env\nL335:     npm run db:generate\nL336:     npm run db:migrate\nL337:     npm run db:seed\nL338:     npm run dev\nL339: \nL340: Set unique local values in `.env`; the seed’s fallback values are development-only and must never be used outside an isolated development database. Player path: `/tale/development-forever-treasure`. GM path: `/quartermaster`.\nL341: ## Commands\nL342: Command Purpose\nL343: `npm run dev:full` Idempotent setup, migration, seed, health check, and background server\nL344: `npm run dev:stop` Safely stop only the recorded development process\nL345: `npm run validate` Fresh DB, format/lint/types/unit/E2E/a11y/build/restart proof\nL346: `npm run dev` Next.js only; assumes setup is already complete\nL347: `npm run build` Production build\nL348: `npm start` Start production build\nL349: `npm test` Six deterministic unit tests\nL350: `npm run test:e2e` Five Chromium/WebKit checks plus one Chromium mutation workflow\nL351: `npm run db:migrate` Apply local SQLite migrations\nL352: `npm run db:seed` Load replaceable development content\nL353: `npm run db:generate:mysql` Generate production MySQL client\nL354: Full setup, validation stages, output locations, clean-clone instructions, and troubleshooting are in cite98†local development and cite99†testing .\nL355: ## Repository workflow\nL356: \nL357: `main` is canonical. At task start: fetch, inspect status/remotes, and pull with rebase when clean. At task end: validate, review the complete diff, commit intentionally, fetch/rebase if needed, push without force, and verify local `HEAD` equals `origin/main`. See cite100†Codex handoff .\nL358: ## Important limitations\nL359: \nL360: The full story, final art/audio, multi-player device management, horizontal scale-out for SSE, and production deployment are later work. The current sound is a restrained procedural seal tone; no external copyrighted assets are present. The repository was public during this milestone, so only generic development content was used. See cite101†known limitations .\nL361: ## Next steps\nL362: \nL363: Add CI for the complete validation gate, exercise the parallel MySQL schema in an integration environment, and replace process-local SSE fan-out before multi-instance deployment. Real surprise content remains blocked until repository visibility is verified private.\nL364: \nL365: ## About\nL366: \nL367: No description, website, or topics provided.\nL368: \nL369: ### Resources\nL370: \nL371: Readme\nL372: \nL373: ### Security policy\nL374: \nL375: Security policy\nL376: \nL377: ###  Uh oh!\nL378: \nL379: There was an error while loading. Please reload this page.\nL380: \nL381: cite102† Activity L382: ### Stars\nL383: \nL384: 0 stars\nL385: \nL386: ### Watchers\nL387: \nL388: 0 watching\nL389: \nL390: ### Forks\nL391: \nL392: cite103† 0 forks L393: \nL394: cite104† Report repository  ", "type": "input_text"}]

const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\docs\\player-companion-information-architecture.md\n+# Player Companion information architecture\n+\n+The companion has six URL-addressable sections: `journal`, `chart`, `treasures`, `quests`, `log`, and `finale`. The selected section is stored in the `section` query parameter so refresh, deep links, back/forward navigation, and mobile/desktop handoff share one model. A persistent objective links back to the active journal chapter.\n+\n+```mermaid\n+flowchart LR\n+  O[Current objective] --> J[Journal]\n+  J <--> C[Voyage chart]\n+  J <--> T[Treasure altar]\n+  J <--> Q[Side-quest ledger]\n+  C <--> Q\n+  T --> F[Sealed finale]\n+  J --> L[Ship's log]\n+  C --> L\n+  T --> L\n+  Q --> L\n+  L --> J\n+  L --> C\n+  L --> T\n+  L --> Q\n+  L --> F\n+```\n+\n+All sections are projections of one authenticated public snapshot and one ordered SSE stream. Navigation never fetches hidden content and never starts a second polling loop.\n+\n+Desktop uses an artifact-like section rail and layered workspace. iPhone uses the same semantic navigation as a safe-area-aware bottom strip and one-column content. Locked links may navigate only to a safe locked state; they never cause protected payloads to be requested.\n*** Add File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\docs\\journal-system.md\n+# Journal system\n+\n+Chapters use `LOCKED`, `TEASER`, `READY`, `REVEALING`, `ACTIVE`, `SOLVED`, and `COMPLETE`. Locked/ready chapters serialize only ordinal, state, and an explicitly safe teaser. Narrative, objective, clue, released hints, annotations, and cross-links serialize only for readable states.\n+\n+Hints are ordered records with a nullable release time. The server omits unreleased hints. Viewed state uses the player access identity and stable content keys, so it reconciles across devices that share the invitation identity. Annotations are released `JournalEntry` records and never include GM audit metadata.\n*** Add File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\docs\\voyage-chart.md\n+# Voyage Chart\n+\n+The chart is a data-driven fictional narrative map. `MapLocation` stores internal labels, safe labels, reveal state, exactness, display coordinates, chapter/quest links, and completion. Coordinates and internal region details serialize only after an exact reveal. Rumored locations receive a safe label without coordinates.\n+\n+```mermaid\n+flowchart LR\n+  U[UNKNOWN] --> R[RUMORED]\n+  R --> V[REVEALED]\n+  V --> A[ACTIVE_DESTINATION]\n+  A --> I[VISITED]\n+  I --> C[COMPLETED]\n+  V --> S[SIDE_QUEST]\n+```\n+\n+`MapRoute` stores ordered endpoint keys and reveal state. A route is public only when it and both endpoints are revealed. The visual chart must also expose an equivalent keyboard-accessible location list.\n*** Add File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\docs\\artifact-system.md\n+# Artifact system\n+\n+Artifacts progress through `UNKNOWN`, `SILHOUETTE`, `DISCOVERED`, `AWARDED`, `INSPECTED`, `CONNECTED`, and the future-only `ASSEMBLED` state. Unknown records expose only neutral placement structure. Silhouettes expose only an approved safe name/label. Full names, descriptions, discovery text, related chapter, and award time require a released state.\n+\n+```mermaid\n+flowchart LR\n+  U[UNKNOWN] --> S[SILHOUETTE]\n+  S --> D[DISCOVERED]\n+  D --> A[AWARDED]\n+  A --> I[INSPECTED]\n+  I --> C[CONNECTED]\n+  C -. future phase .-> X[ASSEMBLED]\n+```\n+\n+Assembly groups and neutral positions exist for layout testing, but the seed deliberately does not resemble or name a real finale object.\n*** Add File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\docs\\side-quest-system.md\n+# Side-quest system\n+\n+Optional mysteries use `HIDDEN`, `RUMORED`, `DISCOVERED`, `ACTIVE`, `PARTIALLY_COMPLETE`, `COMPLETE`, `MISSED`, and `ARCHIVED`. Hidden records are omitted. Rumored records expose only a safe teaser. Discovered and later records may expose title, premise, ordered objectives, safe reward, and released cross-links.\n+\n+```mermaid\n+flowchart LR\n+  H[HIDDEN] --> R[RUMORED]\n+  R --> D[DISCOVERED]\n+  D --> A[ACTIVE]\n+  A --> P[PARTIALLY_COMPLETE]\n+  P --> C[COMPLETE]\n+  A -. gentle expiry .-> M[MISSED]\n+  C --> X[ARCHIVED]\n+```\n+\n+Side quests never block the main chapter state machine. Rewards are persisted, idempotent domain outcomes and may enrich—not gate—the future finale.\n*** Add File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\docs\\ships-log.md\n+# Ship's Log\n+\n+The Ship's Log is derived from ordered `ProgressEvent` records by `src/domain/ships-log.ts`. The transformation owns player-facing title, summary, symbol, importance, destination section, and safe target key. Unknown/internal events return no entry and never crash rendering.\n+\n+```mermaid\n+flowchart LR\n+  G[Authenticated GM action] --> E[Domain event]\n+  E --> S[Campaign snapshot]\n+  E --> A[Audit record]\n+  E --> T[Player log transformer]\n+  T --> L[Atmospheric log entry]\n+  E --> SSE[Ordered SSE]\n+  SSE --> L\n+```\n+\n+Raw payloads, actor IDs, audit records, credentials, and internal notes are never log fields. The snapshot caps the initial log projection at 250 entries; later phases may add cursor pagination beyond that boundary.\n*** Add File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\docs\\finale-shell.md\n+# Finale shell\n+\n+The schema supports `HIDDEN`, `TEASED`, `SEALED`, `REQUIREMENTS_PARTIAL`, `READY`, `UNLOCKED`, and `COMPLETE`, but Phase 2 uses only the first four. Public requirements are generic symbolic counters. Optional stars are marked optional and do not block the main voyage.\n+\n+No real finale copy, object, dependency, destination, or unlock sequence is present. `READY`, `UNLOCKED`, and `COMPLETE` remain structural future states and must not be activated until a later authorized phase.\n*** Add File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\docs\\unseen-content.md\n+# Unseen content\n+\n+`ViewedContent` stores `(playerAccessId, contentType, contentKey)` uniquely. This makes acknowledgements idempotent and persistent across refreshes and devices using the same player access identity. Ceremony playback remains device-specific in `ViewedCeremony` because replay expectations are local.\n+\n+```mermaid\n+flowchart LR\n+  E[Released domain event] --> P[Public snapshot projection]\n+  P --> U[Unseen indicator]\n+  U --> V[Meaningful section view]\n+  V --> API[Viewed-content API]\n+  API --> DB[(ViewedContent)]\n+  DB --> R[Reconciled snapshot]\n+  R --> C[Indicator cleared]\n+```\n+\n+Content types are chapter, hint, annotation, map, route, artifact, quest, log, and finale. Indicators use text/screen-reader meaning in addition to visual marks.\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));

SSE payloads pass through the same explicit allowlist and never stream raw stored payloads. Player routes require a campaign-bound, unexpired access identity and expose no mutation endpoint.\n+\n+The repository is public as of 2026-07-16. Real story, surprise, romantic, location, photographic, token, and finale content is prohibited until visibility is verified private.\n*** Update File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\docs\\testing.md\n@@\n # Testing\n+\n+## Phase 2 coverage\n+\n+Unit coverage includes event reconciliation, event-to-log transformation, malformed/unknown event fallback, and event payload allowlisting. Database verification checks the five-chapter, five-location, two-route, five-artifact, and four-quest development fixture structure plus contiguous event/snapshot/audit invariants. Presets are reset with `npm run db:preset -- <name>`; default `npm run db:seed` retains the sealed acceptance start.\n*** Update File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\docs\\asset-licenses.md\n@@\n # Asset licenses\n+\n+## Phase 2\n+\n+No third-party story map, game art, photographs, or ripped game audio were added. The companion shell uses CSS, text symbols, and existing procedural audio only. Any later image or sound asset must record source, author, license, modification, and in-product use here before commit.\n*** Update File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\docs\\known-limitations.md\n@@\n # Known limitations\n+\n+## Phase 2 boundaries\n+\n+- The repository is public; final story and surprise content is intentionally blocked.\n+- Finale unlock/assembly is structural only and cannot enter `READY` or later states through Phase 2 controls.\n+- SSE fan-out remains process-local and needs Redis or equivalent before multi-instance production deployment.\n+- Initial Ship's Log projection is capped at 250 entries; cursor pagination is future scale work.\n+- Production MySQL migration must be exercised against an actual MySQL 8 integration environment.\n+- Final art/audio, real content authoring, and production deployment belong to later phases.\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));

(\n                <>\n                  <p className=\"eyebrow\">Chapter sealed</p>\n                  <h2>Awaiting the captainâ€™s signal</h2>\n                  <p>The page is quiet. Its ink remains somewhere beyond the horizon.</p>\n                  <div className=\"seal-wrap\">\n                    <div className=\"seal-cracks\" />\n                    <div className=\"wax-seal\">F</div>\n                  </div>\n                </>\n              ) : (\n                <>\n                  <motion.p className=\"eyebrow ink-line\" animate={{ opacity: stageIndex >= 4 ? 1 : 0 }}>\n                    Chapter {snapshot.chapter.ordinal}\n                  </motion.p>\n                  <motion.h2 className=\"ink-line\" animate={{ opacity: stageIndex >= 4 ? 1 : 0 }}>\n                    {String(content.title ?? \"\")}\n                  </motion.h2>\n                  <motion.p className=\"narrative ink-line\" animate={{ opacity: stageIndex >= 5 ? 1 : 0 }}>\n                    {String(content.narrative ?? \"\")}\n                  </motion.p>\n                  <motion.div className=\"objective-card ink-line\" animate={{ opacity: stageIndex >= 6 ? 1 : 0 }}>\n                    <span>Present course</span>\n                    <strong>{objective}</strong>\n                  </motion.div>\n                  <motion.blockquote className=\"riddle ink-line\" animate={{ opacity: stageIndex >= 7 ? 1 : 0 }}>\n                    {String(content.riddle ?? \"\")\n                      .split(\"\\n\")\n                      .map((line) => (\n                        <span key={line}>{line}</span>\n                      ))}\n                  </motion.blockquote>\n                </>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </section>\n        <aside className={`treasure-panel panel ${view === \"treasure\" ? \"mobile-current\" : \"\"}`}>\n          <PanelTitle index=\"II\" title=\"Recovered relics\" />\n          <div className=\"artifact-frame\">\n            {snapshot.artifacts[0] ? (\n              <div className=\"compass-needle\">\n                <i />\n                <b>{snapshot.artifacts[0].name}</b>\n              </div>\n            ) : (\n              <>\n                <div className=\"empty-sigil\">â—‡</div>\n                <span>One shape waits in the velvet</span>\n              </>\n            )}\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"side-quest\">\n            <span>Whispered course</span>\n            <b>{snapshot.sideQuest?.state === \"UNDISCOVERED\" ? \"Undiscovered\" : snapshot.sideQuest?.title}</b>\n          </div>\n        </aside>\n      </div>\n      {opened && cinematic.isPlaying && (\n        <div className={`voyage-introduction intro-${cinematic.name} intro-stage-${cinematic.stage}`} role=\"status\" aria-live=\"polite\">\n          <div className=\"intro-horizon\" aria-hidden=\"true\" />\n          <div className=\"intro-wave wave-back\" aria-hidden=\"true\" />\n          <div className=\"intro-wave wave-front\" aria-hidden=\"true\" />\n          <div className=\"intro-fog\" aria-hidden=\"true\" />\n          <div className=\"intro-title\"><span>The Forever Treasure</span><small>Voyage Companion</small></div>\n          {cinematic.stage !== \"dark-sea\" && <button onClick={cinematic.skip}>Skip ceremony</button>}\n        </div>\n      )}\n      <div className=\"objective-dock\">\n        <span>Current objective</span>\n        <strong>{objective}</strong>\n        <button onClick={() => setView(\"journal\")}>Return to clue</button>\n      </div>\n      <nav className=\"mobile-nav\" aria-label=\"Companion views\">\n        {(\n          [\n            [\"journal\", \"Journal\"],\n            [\"chart\", \"Chart\"],\n            [\"treasure\", \"Relics\"],\n          ] as const\n        ).map(([key, label]) => (\n          <button className={view === key ? <ol className=\"log-timeline\">{snapshot.log.map((entry) => <li key={entry.key} className={entry.unseen ? \"unseen\" : \"\"}><span aria-hidden=\"true\">{entry.symbol}</span><div><time>{new Date(entry.timestamp).toLocaleString([], { dateStyle: \"medium\", timeStyle: \"short\" })}</time><h3>{entry.title}</h3><p>{entry.summary}</p>{entry.section !== \"log\" && <button onClick={() => navigate(entry.section)}>Open {views.find((item) => item.key === entry.section)?.label}</button>}</div></li>)}</ol> : <EmptyState title=\"The log awaits its first line\" body=\"Player-facing voyage events will be recorded here automatically.\" />}\n+      </section>}\n+      {opened && view === \"finale\" && <section className=\"companion-section finale-chamber\" aria-labelledby=\"finale-heading\">\n+        <div className=\"finale-mechanism\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><i /><i /><i /><b>F</b></div><p className=\"eyebrow\">{snapshot.finale.state.replaceAll(\"_\", \" \")}</p><h2 id=\"finale-heading\">The Final Seal</h2><p>{snapshot.finale.teaser ?? \"The last pages remain safely chained. Nothing beyond the seal has been entrusted to this companion.\"}</p>\n+        {snapshot.finale.requirements.length > 0 && <ul className=\"finale-requirements\">{snapshot.finale.requirements.map((item) => <li key={item.key}><span>{item.label}{item.optional ? \" · optional\" : \"\"}</span><div aria-label={`${item.current} of ${item.target}`}>{Array.from({ length: item.target }, (_, index) => <i key={index} className={index < item.current ? \"lit\" : \"\"} />)}</div></li>)}</ul>}\n+      </section>}\n+      {inspectedArtifact && <div className=\"artifact-inspection-backdrop\" onClick={() => setSelectedArtifact(null)}><section className=\"artifact-inspection\" role=\"dialog\" aria-modal=\"true\" aria-labelledby=\"artifact-name\" onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}><button className=\"close-inspection\" onClick={() => setSelectedArtifact(null)}>Close</button><div className=\"artifact-focus\" aria-hidden=\"true\">◇</div><p className=\"eyebrow\">{inspectedArtifact.state.replaceAll(\"_\", \" \")}</p><h2 id=\"artifact-name\">{inspectedArtifact.name}</h2><p>{inspectedArtifact.description}</p>{inspectedArtifact.discoveryText && <blockquote>{inspectedArtifact.discoveryText}</blockquote>}<dl><div><dt>Category</dt><dd>{inspectedArtifact.category?.replaceAll(\"_\", \" \")}</dd></div>{inspectedArtifact.chapterOrdinal && <div><dt>Journal</dt><dd>Chapter {inspectedArtifact.chapterOrdinal}</dd></div>}{inspectedArtifact.connectedArtifactKey && <div><dt>Connection</dt><dd>A released relationship answers elsewhere on the altar.</dd></div>}</dl></section></div>}\n@@\n-      <div className=\"objective-dock\">\n+      <div className={`objective-dock ${objectiveOpen ? \"expanded\" : \"\"}`}>\n         <span>Current objective</span>\n         <strong>{objective}</strong>\n-        <button onClick={() => setView(\"journal\")}>Return to clue</button>\n+        {objectiveOpen && <p>Chapter {snapshot.chapter.ordinal}{snapshot.chapter.title ? ` · ${snapshot.chapter.title}` : \"\"}{snapshot.chapter.hints?.length ? ` · ${snapshot.chapter.hints.length} hint${snapshot.chapter.hints.length === 1 ? \"\" : \"s\"} available` : \" · no released hints\"}</p>}\n+        <button onClick={() => setObjectiveOpen((value) => !value)} aria-expanded={objectiveOpen}>{objectiveOpen ? \"Collapse\" : \"Review\"}</button>\n+        <button onClick={() => navigate(\"journal\")}>Return to clue</button>\n       </div>\n@@\n-        {(\n-          [\n-            [\"journal\", \"Journal\"],\n-            [\"chart\", \"Chart\"],\n-            [\"treasure\", \"Relics\"],\n-          ] as const\n-        ).map(([key, label]) => (\n-          <button className={view === key ? \"active\" : \"\"} onClick={() => setView(key)} key={key}>\n-            {label}\n-          </button>\n-        ))}\n+        {views.map(({ key, label }) => <button className={view === key ? \"active\" : \"\"} onClick={() => navigate(key)} key={key}>{label}{snapshot.unseen[key] > 0 && <span className=\"sr-only\">, new content</span>}</button>)}\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));

color: #2e2118; background: linear-gradient(105deg, #d9c293, #eee0bb 48%, #ceb485); border: 1px solid #9d7d47; box-shadow: 0 28px 75px #000b, inset 0 0 60px #7a4c1922; }\r\n.companion-section > header { max-width: 760px; border-bottom: 1px solid #72533355; margin-bottom: 1.4rem; }\r\n.companion-section h2 { margin: .2rem 0; font: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 4rem)/1 var(--font-display); }\r\n.quest-pages { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(230px,1fr)); gap: 1rem; }\r\n.quest-note { position: relative; padding: 1.2rem; min-height: 210px; background: #f0dfb7; border: 1px solid #7d5c3766; box-shadow: 5px 8px 12px #3d27152b; rotate: -.3deg; }\r\n.quest-note:nth-child(even) { rotate: .45deg; }\r\n.quest-note > span,.quest-note small { font: 700 .62rem/1.2 var(--font-sans); letter-spacing: .09em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7b4439; }\r\n.quest-note h3 { margin: .4rem 0; font: 1.5rem/1 var(--font-display); }\r\n.quest-note li.complete { text-decoration: line-through; opacity: .65; }\r\n.log-timeline { list-style: none; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0; max-width: 850px; }\r\n.log-timeline li { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 3.5rem 1fr; gap: 1rem; padding: 1rem 0 1.2rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #775a3855; }\r\n.log-timeline li > span { width: 3rem; height: 3rem; display: grid; place-items: center; border: 1px solid #8c6a3e; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 1.25rem; }\r\n.log-timeline li.unseen > span { box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px #9c383522; }\r\n.log-timeline time { font: .68rem var(--font-sans); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .08em; color: #765b43; }\r\n.log-timeline h3 { margin: .2rem 0; }\r\n.finale-chamber { text-align: center; color: #d9cba4; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 40%, #24383a, #101c1e 45%, #070d10 85%); border-color: #a9905c; }\r\n.finale-mechanism { position: relative; width: 220px; height: 220px; margin: 0 auto 1rem; display: grid; place-items: center; }\r\n.finale-mechanism i { position: absolute; inset: 10%; border: 2px solid #9b8051; border-radius: 50%; }\r\n.finale-mechanism i:nth-child(2) { inset: 25%; border-style: dashed; }\r\n.finale-mechanism i:nth-child(3) { inset: 39%; }\r\n.finale-mechanism b { color: #d1b678; font: 2rem var(--font-display); }\r\n.finale-requirements { list-style: none; display: grid; gap: .9rem; width: min(620px,100%); margin: 2rem auto 0; padding: 0; text-align: left; }\r\n.finale-requirements li { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; padding: .8rem; border-top: 1px solid #9b805144; }\r\n.finale-requirements div { display: flex; gap: .35rem; }\r\n31:/* Phase 2 complete companion shell */\n", "type": "input_text"}]

If an applicable non-browser tool exists, use it and stop without continuing into browser setup; otherwise, continue with Browser.\n\nUse this skill for browser automation tasks such as inspecting pages, navigating, testing local apps, clicking, typing, taking screenshots, and reading visible page state.\r\n\r\nIf this plugin is listed as available in the session, treat that as mandatory reading before browser work.
